scope: composition-feasible argument-bearing chapters and opening movement plus regenerated source-grounded commissions and a frozen Chapters 1-3 first-draft batch
model_api: route-restricted: OpenRouter only for Opus 4.6 chapter writing and DeepSeek research; fresh native Codex subagents for planning, reviewing, auditing, and judging
model_output_allowance_policy: quality only: no economy, speed, cost, reasoning-token, or harness output optimization; permitted calls receive the greatest authorized allowance and continue when required
baseline_boundary: cf5c825 — run-012 frozen with H-049 REFUTED and a valid v2.3 product-panel FAIL; no run-012 prose promoted
last_accepted_product: production-books/quit-sugar/chapters/chapter-01.md from run-002 and chapter-02.md from run-004
preregistration_state: the H-050 contract candidate passed its independent pre-freeze audit; no run-013 plan, commission, chapter, metric, or product-panel inference exists
observed_failure: setup-only and deferred opening architecture plus overloaded later chapter jobs leaves the writer choosing between safe catalog-and-defer prose and forceful invented connective tissue
single_generic_lever: one shared intelligent planning acceptance contract requiring every argument-bearing chapter, and the opening movement collectively, to be safely composable from owned evidence and logic into one completed value-bearing belief correction within budget

lever_boundary.one_mechanism: planner instruction and reviewer acceptance language are the two sides of the same planning contract, not independent levers
lever_boundary.required: definition, safety, recap, and handoff functions may support the belief-moving architecture without carrying or inventing a second thesis; the planner may freely rearchitect the whole book
lever_boundary.forbidden: schema, checklist, deterministic reasoning procedure, prescribed section sequence, new pipeline stage, specimen wording, reference leakage, chapter-specific patch, or post-outcome prompt amendment
lever_boundary.freeze: independently audit and commit the shared contract before fresh planning

pre_freeze_contract_audit.input_scope: committed H-050 hypothesis section, committed run-013 manifest, and only the two current planning prompts; no history, reference, judges, or prose
pre_freeze_contract_audit.environment_policy: provider API credentials explicitly unset; ephemeral read-only context; user config and rules ignored; multi_agent disabled
stderr_diagnostics: 15 state-db discrepancy fallback warnings before thread start
one file-watcher failed-to-unwatch warning after successful completion
pre_freeze_contract_audit.finding: the matching planner and reviewer language cleanly instantiates exactly one behavior-agnostic, non-deterministic composition-feasibility lever and directly rejects catalog-and-defer without forcing support chapters to invent a second thesis
pre_freeze_contract_audit.non_blocking_residual_risk: intelligent reviewers may differ on when a correction is sufficiently completed or value-bearing

pre_freeze_verification.shellcheck: unavailable; canonical check skipped it transparently

held_fixed: frozen Stage-A v2.3 judge prompts, schemas, aggregation, controls, thresholds, model route, and blindness
all objective, grounded-fidelity, safety, and promotion gates
regeneration_law: generate a fresh complete master plan, then all C-01-C-03 source-grounded commissions, then all three first drafts; freeze the full batch before any chapter revision or product inference

prediction.pre_prose: an independent reviewer accepts the fresh plan and resulting commissions as composition-feasible under the shared contract
prediction.blinded_post_output_audit: after drafts freeze, an auditor blind to drafts, metrics, judges, and reference confirms from the contract, plan, and commissions that the lever was instantiated
prediction.primary_causal: all three first drafts are materially grounded-clean and efficacy receives at most one reference verdict with role score at least 0.35
prediction.secondary_product: each craft target receives at most one reference verdict, critical_ours excludes repetitive_sag and weak_ending_handoff, all three length bands pass, and every existing Stage-A gate passes

causal_decision_rule.supported: the blinded post-output audit confirms instantiation, all three first drafts are materially grounded-clean, and efficacy receives at most one reference verdict with role score at least 0.35
causal_decision_rule.refuted: the blinded post-output audit confirms instantiation, all three first drafts are materially grounded-clean, and efficacy still fails through at least three reference verdicts or role score below 0.35
causal_decision_rule.inconclusive: any first draft has a material grounded defect, plan or commission instantiation is unaccepted or ambiguous, writer violation of an accepted handoff makes ownership ambiguous, the panel is invalid, or the accepted corpus cannot support the architecture
causal_decision_rule.product_boundary: craft, length, objective, safety, and every other Stage-A gate remain promotion requirements but do not decide H-050 causal status

signal_risks: blind judges may reward invented force; grounded cleanliness is required for causal interpretation
same-model native replica deltas are noisy even under frozen order pooling
a fresh planner sample can improve through stochastic resampling rather than the contract
plan quality can improve while the Opus persuasive prior remains sufficient
source-grounded commission realization can weaken an accepted plan
any grounded defect, unaccepted or ambiguous handoff, or invalid panel makes the causal result inconclusive

research_orchestration.run_013_action: not rerun; accepted research is held fixed

research_lead.model: not rerun — accepted research held fixed

models.research_reviewer: not rerun — accepted research held fixed
models.planner_execution: fresh native Codex subagent; never OpenRouter
models.plan_reviewer_execution: fresh independent native Codex subagent; never OpenRouter
models.commissioner_execution: fresh native Codex context per chapter; never OpenRouter

later_writer_arm.status: not part of H-050; requires a separate preregistered end-to-end arm

notes: Run-012 remains immutable evidence. Product roles stay blind to the reference and judge output. OpenRouter remains restricted to Opus chapter writing and DeepSeek research.
